title: WDM Reviewer LLM Response Schema
description: Structured-output schema for the WDM Reviewer stage LLM call. The LLM emits ONLY advisory_notes[] (max 3 strings). Verdict, checks, and claim_flags are set deterministically by the rule engine in pipeline/engine/review_base.py and are NOT LLM-overridable. Sprint C.E Phase 1 structural parity (AD-2026-04-24n). Adapted from AGM reviewer-schema.json.

advisory_notes.description: Optional prose observations for the Composer's internal awareness. Each entry <= 500 characters. Emit [] if nothing useful to surface.
